title: UCMuon: Open-source cosmic muon simulation suite for muography
description: UCMuon (You See Muon!) is an open-source cosmic muon simulation suite with a browser-based graphical interface, deployable locally or as command-line executables on an HPC cluster. It provides surface muon generation (eight spectrum models, three source geometries), six transport engines including MUSIC, Bethe-Bloch, PROPOSAL, and a self-developed stochastic engine (UCMuon-MC), DEM-based terrain ray-tracing for real field deployments, and a muographic density-inversion suite. Primary applications are volcano muography (MURAVES/Vesuvius) and subsurface CO2 storage monitoring. The MUSIC engine is not redistributed; see docs/MUSIC_FILES.md.

creators.name: Basiri, Hamid
creators.affiliation: UCLouvain Muography Group, Université catholique de Louvain, Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium
